# Accreditation Standards Survey — Item Draft

*Primary source declared: Article 7, Ministry of Education Higher Education
Evaluation Regulations (verified 2024-03-15). Full list per primary_sources.md:
5 categories enumerated below verbatim in all option-list items.*

## Section A: Standards Prioritisation

1. Which of the following accreditation standard categories does your
   programme prioritise most in its self-evaluation process?
   (Select one; source: Article 7, Ministry of Education)

   a. Teaching quality and student learning outcomes
   b. Research output and knowledge dissemination
   c. Institutional governance and resource management
   d. Community engagement and social responsibility
   e. Internationalisation and global partnerships

2. Which standard category has received the most resource investment from
   your institution in the past three years?
   (Select one; source: Article 7, Ministry of Education)

   a. Teaching quality and student learning outcomes
   b. Research output and knowledge dissemination
   c. Institutional governance and resource management
   d. Community engagement and social responsibility
   e. Internationalisation and global partnerships
